caption: The video features a split-screen format with two individuals engaged in a conversation. On the left side, a man is seated in an office environment in Zurich, Switzerland, surrounded by multiple computer monitors displaying various data and graphs. He appears to be listening attentively. On the right side, a woman is seated at a desk with a laptop in front of her, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. The background is a solid yellow color, and the logo "Cointelegraph" is visible in the top right corner, suggesting that the discussion may be related to cryptocurrency or financial topics. The overall setting indicates a professional and informative dialogue, likely part of a news segment or interview.
